user.title: Buffer Tank
user.description: Configure the physical properties of your buffer tank. Temperature sensors and thresholds are added afterwards as subentries from the integration card.

data_description.tank_volume: Total water volume of the buffer tank in liters.
data_description.tank_height: Total height of the buffer tank in millimeters.
data_description.max_temperature: Maximum water temperature used to calculate 100% State of Charge.
data_description.ema_smoothing: Smoothing factor (EMA alpha) for power sensors. Lower = smoother, higher = more responsive.
data_description.return_temp_entity: Optional: sensor measuring the return water temperature. Used as reference for energy calculation.
data_description.ambient_temp_entity: Optional: sensor measuring the ambient temperature around the tank.
data_description.insulation_r_value: Optional: thermal resistance of the tank insulation in m²·K/W. Required together with ambient sensor to calculate heat loss.

init.title: Buffer Tank
init.description: Update the physical properties of your buffer tank. To add or remove probes and thresholds, use the subentry buttons on the integration card.

data_description.tank_volume: Total water volume of the buffer tank in liters.
data_description.tank_height: Total height of the buffer tank in millimeters.
data_description.max_temperature: Maximum water temperature used to calculate 100% State of Charge.
data_description.ema_smoothing: Smoothing factor (EMA alpha) for power sensors.
data_description.return_temp_entity: Optional: sensor measuring the return water temperature.
data_description.ambient_temp_entity: Optional: sensor measuring the ambient temperature around the tank.
data_description.insulation_r_value: Optional: thermal resistance of the tank insulation in m²·K/W.

user.title: Add Temperature Probe
user.description: Configure a temperature probe. Leave the sensor entity empty to create a virtual probe that interpolates its temperature from the tank profile. Tank height: {tank_height} mm.

data_description.name: Friendly name shown for this probe.
data_description.position: Vertical position of the probe in millimeters, measured from the bottom of the tank.
data_description.entity_id: Sensor providing the temperature at this position. Leave empty for a virtual probe.

reconfigure.title: Edit Temperature Probe
reconfigure.description: Update this probe. Tank height: {tank_height} mm.

data_description.name: Friendly name shown for this probe.
data_description.position: Vertical position of the probe in millimeters.
data_description.entity_id: Sensor providing the temperature. Leave empty for a virtual probe.

error.position_exceeds_height: Probe position cannot exceed tank height.

user.title: Add Threshold
user.description: Add a binary threshold that switches when a probe temperature crosses the configured limits.

data_description.name: Friendly name for the threshold entity.
data_description.probe_subentry_id: Probe whose temperature is compared against the threshold.
data_description.min_temp: Turns on when the temperature reaches or exceeds this value.
data_description.hysteresis: Turns off when the temperature drops below min − hysteresis.

data_description.name: Friendly name for the threshold entity.
data_description.probe_subentry_id: Probe whose temperature is compared against the threshold.
data_description.min_temp: Turns on when the temperature reaches or exceeds this value.
data_description.hysteresis: Turns off when the temperature drops below min − hysteresis.

abort.no_probes: Add at least one probe subentry before creating a threshold.
